description: Dispatches a cleanup call on every exit. The cleanup's Result is discarded; a failed cleanup supersedes the Result in flight under the onAlways rules, carrying its originator's code.

action.description: Dispatches the configured call, wrapped by the configured middleware stack. Gated off, nothing is dispatched.

call.description: The cleanup dispatch: a call object, taken structurally.

middleware.description: A middleware stack around the cleanup dispatch, taken structurally.
